---
title: "XXXXX"
subtitle: "Talk at XXXX"
author: 
  - name: "Mine Dogucu"
    affiliations: "University of California Irvine"
date: "XXXXX"
footer: "[mdogucu.github.io/XXXX](https://mdogucu.github.io/XXXX)"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, style.scss]
    slide-number: true
    incremental: true
    chalkboard: true # Allows drawing on slides
    transition: fade
    link-external-newwindow: true
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    slide-tone: true
---

## Welcome

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="60%"}
-   **Context** 
-   **Goal** 
-   **Vibe** 
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}

::: {.note}
This is note block for extra emphasis or side thoughts.
:::

:::

::::

## Features Included

-   **Chalkboard:** Press `B` to broadcast a whiteboard or `C` to draw on the slide.


# Section One {background-color="#003b49" .inverse}

## Centered Text

::: {.v-center}
A brief overview
:::

# Section Two {background-color="#003b49" .inverse}

This text will appear below the mustard line, aligned to the left.

## Another header

This is how math formulae would look like.

$$p(\theta | y) = \frac{p(y | \theta) p(\theta)}{p(y)}$$



## Image Example



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-alt: "Mine Dogucu holding a large die as big as her head in her hand. She is wearing a floral long-sleeve shirt and has curly ear length hair."
#| out-width: "15%"
knitr::include_graphics("https://www.minedogucu.com/img/Mine_Dice.png")
```

# QUESTIONS? 


{{< fa link >}} [minedogucu.com](http://minedogucu.com)  
{{< fa brands github >}} [mdogucu](http://github.com/mdogucu)  
{{< fa brands bluesky >}} [@minedogucu.com](https://bsky.app/profile/minedogucu.com)  
{{< fa brands linkedin >}} [minedogucu](https://www.linkedin.com/in/minedogucu/)  
{{< fa brands mastodon >}} [@MineDogucu](https://mastodon.social/@MineDogucu)
